en.tool.description: Capture a photo from a USB camera via ffmpeg, or list available video devices. Supports Windows (dshow), Linux (v4l2), macOS (avfoundation).
en.param.action.description: Action: capture (take a photo), list (show devices), or list_caps (show capabilities like resolutions and FPS for a device).
en.param.devname.description: Device name/path (overrides index). On Linux use /dev/videoN. Use list action to find names.
en.param.width.description: Capture width in pixels (e.g. 1920). Uses default if omitted.
en.param.height.description: Capture height in pixels (e.g. 1080). Uses default if omitted.
en.param.fps.description: Frames per second (e.g. 30). Uses default if omitted.
en.param.outdir.description: Output directory for captured images. Default: outputs/usb_camera.

es.tool.description: Capturar imagen de una cámara USB.
es.param.camera_id.description: Índice del dispositivo de cámara (0 = predeterminado).
es.param.width.description: Ancho de la imagen en píxeles.
es.param.height.description: Alto de la imagen en píxeles.
es.err.camera_not_found: No se encontró cámara en el índice {index}.
es.err.capture_failed: Error al capturar imagen de la cámara.
es.err.opencv_missing: OpenCV no está disponible. Instalar con: pip install opencv-python
